intentSynonyms: show me my conversations in telegram
see all my conversations in telegram
list recent chats and conversations in telegram
description: List recent Telegram conversations (dialogs) sorted by most recent activity. Returns chats, groups, channels, and bots. Use folder_id 0 for the main chat list, 1 for archived chats.

limit.description: Number of conversations to return (default 20, max 100)

folder_id.description: Folder/filter ID — 0 for main list (default), 1 for archive
